prompt: Quiero un artículo de presentación de gormaran.io para el blog: qué es, para quién es, qué herramientas tiene y por qué usarlo. Keyword: 'herramientas de IA para marketing'. Target: emprendedores y marketers. Español.

assertions.text: Output includes an SEO title between 50 and 65 characters
Output includes a meta description between 140 and 160 characters
Output includes a URL slug in lowercase with hyphens
Primary keyword 'herramientas de IA para marketing' or variant appears in the SEO title
Article body contains at least 4 H2 headings (## in markdown)
Article includes a call to action referencing gormaran.io
Article body is at least 900 words
Article mentions at least 4 different tool categories from gormaran.io
The full article is written in Spanish
